title: digitaria adscendens var. pes-avis
intro: Digitaria adscendens var. pes-avis, also known as finger grass, is a type of grass commonly found in tropical regions. The medicinal properties of finger grass include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are used to treat various ailments such as skin infections and wounds. The health benefits of finger grass include its ability to reduce fever, relieve respiratory issues, and aid in digestion. Finger grass can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or poultices, and its leaves can be crushed and applied topically to affected areas.
